name: Scotch-a-Roos
recipeInstructions:
Mix sugar and syrup together in a heavy saucepan. Heat over medium heat until boiling, stirring constantly. Stirring is important to prevent burning.
Remove from heat immediately and add butter and Rice Krispies. Spread mixture in a greased 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
Prepare topping: In microwave or double boiler, melt chocolate chips and butterscotch bits. Spread over cereal mixture. Refrigerate for 1 hour, then cut into squares. These can be stored in the refrigerator or at room temperature, depending on how hard you want them to be.
